trust_boundary.name: verify_authenticode_signature
trust_boundary.rationale: Calls CryptMsgGetParam, CryptMsgClose, CertFindCertificateInStore, CertCloseStore, CertFreeCertificateContext; classic Authenticode/CMS verify driver.

trust_boundary.name: verify_file_trust
trust_boundary.rationale: Calls WinVerifyTrust directly and delegates to verify_file_via_catalog (FUN_140004ee0); top-level trust verifier.

trust_boundary.name: verify_file_via_catalog
trust_boundary.rationale: Calls CryptCATAdminAcquireContext/CalcHashFromFileHandle/EnumCatalogFromHash/CatalogInfoFromContext + WinVerifyTrust; catalog-based file trust verification.

trust_boundary.name: verify_signer_cert_chain
trust_boundary.rationale: Invokes cert_get_subject_name (140003ba0) and FUN_140003ef0/0039f0; orchestrates signer cert validation within signature pipeline.

ipc_source.name: service__on_control_handler
ipc_source.rationale: Strings 'service::on_control_handler','service_manager::unprotect_service'. SCM control-handler callback dispatching control codes; called by FUN_140016eb0 (control handler thunk).

ipc_source.name: fp_format_dispatch_fe
ipc_source.rationale: Calls __acrt_fltout, fp_format_f_internal, fp_format_e_internal; subroutine of FUN_140047bf4 that dispatches between %f and %e formatting.

ipc_source.name: fp_format_dispatch_full
ipc_source.rationale: Caller is type_case_a; calls fp_format_a/fp_format_e/fp_format_f_internal/__acrt_fltout/strcpy_s — top-level %a/%e/%f/%g printf FP formatter.

ipc_source.name: guarded_recursive_dispatch_14000ff70
ipc_source.rationale: Self-recursive, calls _guard_dispatch_icall and __uncaught_exception. CFG-guarded virtual dispatch with EH; shared by 5 unrelated callers. Likely tree/visitor recursion.

ipc_source.name: init_internal_crash_handler
ipc_source.rationale: Reads 'Software\Bitdefender\InternalCrashEnabled' via RegOpenKeyExW, spawns CreateThread with 'crash#'/'abort#' tokens; classic crash-handler bootstrap.

ipc_source.name: thread_init_dispatch_wrapper
ipc_source.rationale: Calls init_thread_local_once then _guard_dispatch_icall; thin wrapper around a thread-safe-once callback dispatch.

ipc_source.name: vb_dispatch_icall_with_seh_a
ipc_source.rationale: 225 insns, callers in init/setup region, callees include _guard_dispatch_icall + __uncaught_exception; SEH-wrapped indirect dispatcher. Distinct from 1400147e0/140014c60 variants.

ipc_source.name: vb_dispatch_icall_with_seh_b
ipc_source.rationale: 164 insns, single caller FUN_14000ac10, same _guard_dispatch_icall+__uncaught_exception pattern as 1400144b0; SEH-protected indirect call wrapper variant.

ipc_source.name: vb_dispatch_icall_with_seh_c
ipc_source.rationale: 103 insns, 5 callers, same _guard_dispatch_icall+FUN_140012ef0+__uncaught_exception template; another SEH indirect-dispatch wrapper sibling.

ipc_source.name: vb_eh_catch_dispatch_helper
ipc_source.rationale: Called from FUN_14003328c (EH dispatcher cluster); chains into FUN_140030c58. Shape matches an MSVC catch-block dispatch/transition helper.

ipc_source.name: vb_eh_catch_dispatch_inner
ipc_source.rationale: Sole callee of FUN_1400308cc (catch-dispatch helper); leaf with no callees. Likely the inner state-transition step of the catch dispatcher.

ipc_source.name: vb_indirect_dispatch_thunk
ipc_source.rationale: Sole callee is _guard_dispatch_icall; CFG-guarded indirect call thunk pattern.

ipc_source.name: vb_json_parse_dispatch_a
ipc_source.rationale: 1353 insns, 35 callees, error strings 'object separator', 'object key', 'number overflow parsing', 'value', 'array', 'object'; JSON parser state machine (likely nlohmann::detail::parser::parse variant A).

ipc_source.name: vb_json_parse_dispatch_b
ipc_source.rationale: 1340 insns mirroring 1400220b0 with same JSON parser error strings but disjoint callee set; sibling parse() instantiation (different value-type template arg) from nlohmann::json detail::parser.

ipc_source.name: vb_load_bdch_crash_handler
ipc_source.rationale: Strings 'bdch.dll', 'enable_crash_handler', 'load crash handler failed'; calls GetModuleHandleExW, FreeLibrary.

file_source.name: parse_config_accepted_controls
file_source.rationale: Strings 'acceptedControls', 'The accepted control is not recognized', 'type must be string'; called from FUN_14001b450; validates a list of accepted service control names.

file_source.name: parse_config_registered_events
file_source.rationale: Strings 'registeredEvents', 'The registered event is not recognized', 'type must be string'; called from FUN_14001b450; parses registered-event list, allocates entries via operator_new.

file_source.name: parse_config_string_field
file_source.rationale: Only string 'type must be string, but is '; small helper called from config parser FUN_14001b450; throws on non-string JSON values. Generic string-field extractor.

file_source.name: parse_config_version
file_source.rationale: Strings 'version', 'The JSON version is not accepted', 'type must be number' + called from main config parser FUN_14001b450; validates the 'version' JSON field as numeric.

defense.name: sanitize_path_env_var
defense.rationale: Strings 'san_path_env-{7D9669CE-...}', 'PATH' (x2); calls GetSystemDirectoryW, SetEnvironmentVariableW, _wdupenv_s — rewrites PATH env to a sanitised value.

defense.name: json_escape_unicode_u4hex
defense.rationale: Format string '<U+%.4X>' is nlohmann/json's unicode-escape rendering for token strings.

defense.name: vb_eh_filter_rethrow_fh4_thunk
defense.rationale: Sole callee ExFilterRethrowFH4: FH4-format C++ EH rethrow filter (newer MSVC funclet variant of ExFilterRethrow).

defense.name: vb_eh_filter_rethrow_thunk
defense.rationale: Sole callee ExFilterRethrow: MSVC C++ EH rethrow filter funclet emitted around rethrow inside a catch block.

defense.name: vb_frame_unwind_filter_thunk
defense.rationale: 8-insn funclet whose only callee is __FrameUnwindFilter: stack-frame unwind exception filter for C++ EH.

defense.name: vb_seh_filter_exe_thunk
defense.rationale: Sole callee _seh_filter_exe: CRT SEH top-level exception filter wrapper used by /EHa to translate SEH into C++.

defense.name: vcrt_seh_filter_stub
defense.rationale: Tiny (6 insn) leaf invoked from _CallSettingFrame, _CallSettingFrameEncoded, and __C_specific_handler — SEH filter trampoline stub.

crypto.name: verify_authenticode_signature
crypto.rationale: Calls CryptMsgGetParam, CryptMsgClose, CertFindCertificateInStore, CertCloseStore, CertFreeCertificateContext; classic Authenticode/CMS verify driver.

crypto.name: vb_hash_bucket_init
crypto.rationale: String 'invalid hash bucket count' anchors this as a hash-table constructor/initializer validating bucket count param.

process_sink.name: set_service_launch_type
process_sink.rationale: String tag 'set_service_launch_type'; opens SCM/service then ChangeServiceConfig2W via 14002bba0.

process_sink.name: start_service
process_sink.rationale: Top-level 'start_service' orchestrator: open_sc_manager, open_service, wait_to_stop/start, calls start_service_inner.

process_sink.name: start_service_inner
process_sink.rationale: Inner helper: StartServiceW + wait_service_to_stop + logs 'StartServiceW failed' under 'start_service' tag.

process_sink.name: vb_start_service_dispatcher
process_sink.rationale: Strings 'start_service_dispatcher', 'StartServiceCtrlDispatcherW failed with error'; calls StartServiceCtrlDispatcherW.

file_write_sink.name: fs_set_file_attributes_by_path
file_write_sink.rationale: Calls __std_fs_open_handle, SetFileInformationByHandle, CloseHandle, GetLastError, terminate — STL <filesystem> permission/attribute mutator (e.g. fs::permissions or last_write_time backend).

dll_load_sink.name: LoadLibraryByName
dll_load_sink.rationale: Calls LoadLibraryW then GetLastError; small wrapper used by FUN_140005f40 and FUN_140012190 to load a DLL with error capture.

dll_load_sink.name: load_library_or_throw
dll_load_sink.rationale: Calls LoadLibraryW + GetLastError; on failure references 'LoadLibrary failed' string and invokes _CxxThrowException.

dll_load_sink.name: vb_load_bdch_dll_resolve_exports
dll_load_sink.rationale: Loads bdch.dll via GetModuleHandleExW, resolves ~17 exports (GetAPIVersion, EnableBdch, SubmitDump, ListDumps, SignalHandler, etc.) via GetProcAddress with error logging.

dll_load_sink.name: vb_unload_module_wrapper
dll_load_sink.rationale: Small 18-instr leaf calls FreeLibrary plus FUN_14002f180 helper; classic module unload/cleanup shape with no other side effects.

privilege_sink.name: service__register_service_events
privilege_sink.rationale: String 'service::register_service_events','events map is empty'; iterates an events map registering service event sinks.

privilege_sink.name: service__unregister_service_events
privilege_sink.rationale: String 'service::unregister_service_events'; mirror of register_service_events using same FUN_140016ed0 helper. Called by run_as_service on shutdown.

privilege_sink.name: service_manager_install_service
privilege_sink.rationale: Calls OpenSCManagerW/OpenServiceW/CreateServiceW/ChangeServiceConfig2W; error strings open_sc_manager failed, open_service failed; large install/configure routine.

privilege_sink.name: change_service_config2_inner
privilege_sink.rationale: Wraps ChangeServiceConfig2W with err logging 'ChangeServiceConfig2W failed'.

privilege_sink.name: onexit_register_thunk
privilege_sink.rationale: Called from _onexit, tail-calls _register_onexit_function; standard CRT onexit shim.

privilege_sink.name: std_facet_register_locked
privilege_sink.rationale: Calls _Facet_Register, _Lockit/~_Lockit pair: STL facet registration under the global locale lock.

privilege_sink.name: std_facet_register_via_FUN1400025d0
privilege_sink.rationale: Same shape as 134e0/12ef0 (_Facet_Register + _Lockit/~_Lockit + _guard_dispatch_icall) but routes through FUN_1400025d0; per-facet registration wrapper.

path_handling.name: sanitize_path_env_var
path_handling.rationale: Strings 'san_path_env-{7D9669CE-...}', 'PATH' (x2); calls GetSystemDirectoryW, SetEnvironmentVariableW, _wdupenv_s — rewrites PATH env to a sanitised value.

path_handling.name: set_env_var_nolock_helper
path_handling.rationale: Sole caller is common_set_variable_in_environment_nolock<char>; helper for environment variable mutation.
